hooks.command: FILEPATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$FILEPATH" ] && echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE '\.env$|\.env\.'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files directly. Set environment variables in the shell or docker-compose.yml instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi

FILEPATH=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); if [ -n "$FILEPATH" ] && echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then /opt/anaconda3/bin/python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('$FILEPATH').read())" 2>&1 || true; fi
